package rulecoverage

func PositiveNotFoundSemanticsImplementedByNilNilReturn() string {
    ruleID := "not_found_semantics_implemented_by_nil_nil_return"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repository or service APIs that encode missing records as `nil, nil` with no explicit result contract."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
